query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: An elevated view of a multi-lane highway at dusk with several vehicles traveling in both directions, their headlights illuminated. A tall curved streetlight pole stands on the left side of the roadway. On the right, a brightly lit elevated transit platform with a covered shelter and waiting passengers runs parallel to the road. The horizon shows faint city lights and additional streetlamps visible through fog, beneath a deep blue-purple twilight sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An elevated view of a multi-lane highway at dusk rendered with motion blur and soft focus, showing several vehicles traveling in both directions with streaked headlights. A curved streetlight pole casts a harsh pink-orange sodium vapor glow across the left side of the roadway, tinting the fog and asphalt with sickly warm hues against the deep blue-purple twilight sky. On the right, a brightly lit elevated transit platform with a covered shelter and waiting passengers runs parallel to the road. The scene is enveloped in heavy mist that crushes tonal separation, flattens detail, and creates a low-contrast, oppressive atmosphere, while distant city lights bleed diffusely into the murky air.
